data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for audit-friendly status/timeline constraints.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for audit-friendly status/timeline constraints preventing ambiguous states. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence of these constraints. The linked use case mentions the need for these constraints but lacks concrete evidence of their implementation or validation in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of audit-friendly status/timeline constraints preventing ambiguous states.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
